summary: CR-24 Phase 1 Ads Intelligence — full backend + frontend testing. All 34 backend pytest tests passed. UI tests confirmed tab bar, tab switching, and all 7 Ads Intelligence sub-components render correctly.

issues: data-testid is 'executive-summary' not 'exec-summary' — minor naming inconsistency but not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Executive Summary KPI cards each have data-testid='exec-card-{label}' which is good for testing
All 6 new backend endpoints are properly auth-guarded (401 without token)
detect_platform correctly identifies all 4 new CSV types: google_search_terms, google_ads, meta_ad, meta_breakdown
MCP status correctly returns enabled:false for both meta and google (no credentials configured)
Empty states render correctly for all tables — expected with no CSV data uploaded

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all components render, tab switching works, subtitle correct

context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-24 Phase 1 fully tested and working. Backend: 6 new endpoints all return correct JSON. Frontend: tab bar with Leads & Funnel / Ads Intelligence tabs, all 7 sub-components (ExecutiveSummary, AiRecommendations, KeywordIntelTable, MetaCreativeTable, LandingPagePanel, DeviceCityPanel, plus date filter bar) render. Empty states show correctly as no ad spend CSV data uploaded. detect_platform unit tests all pass for the 4 new parser types.
